description_long: This object is a thick, stylized steak with a prominent white bone embedded in the center, surrounded by a deep red, textured surface representing the meat. The steak has an irregular, organic shape with a slightly raised, off-white fat or rind encircling the red meat. The bone is T-shaped and stands out starkly against the red interior, which is visually fibrous and marbled. The surface is matte with a subtle roughness, lacking any visible grill marks or charring. There are no visible garnishes, sauces, or plating elements, and the steak appears to be a single, solid piece.
description: A thick, stylized steak with a central white bone, deep red marbled meat, and an off-white rind, lacking grill marks or garnishes.
description_view_0: The steak is seen from a side angle, highlighting the elongated shape, thick white rind, and the T-shaped bone near the center.
description_view_1: This view shows the steak from a more rounded end, with the bone appearing closer to the top and the red meat area more circular.
description_view_2: The steak is viewed from a flatter, wider angle, emphasizing the full length of the bone and the broad expanse of red meat.
description_view_3: Seen from the opposite end, the steak appears more compact, with the bone and a small circular fat deposit visible near the edge.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the surface of the steak.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: light, with marbling concentrated near the edges and around the bone.
